title: 7PracticalOpenClaw用例YouShouldK
problem: At its core, OpenClaw helps turn AI from something you chat with into something that can actually do work for you. It connects messaging apps, tools, memory, 自动化, and agents into one system, so instead of jumping between platforms all day, you can trigger 任务 from places you already use, like Telegram, WhatsApp, or Discord. 在这个 article, we look at seven practical ways people are using OpenClaw to 自动化 任务, stay organized, and 提升 生产力 with real agent 工作流. ##
